title: The Emperors Face the Worst Generation
description: On pages 29–32, this part focuses on Unknown person #29, Unknown person #30, Unknown person #31, Unknown person #32, Queen, Sanji as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That speed, that power! This is no mere human feat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: This...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is a'mizu mawashi to surpass all Mizu mawashi!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It uses the least water possible, which gives his noodles both firmness and a glossy luster!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Less water also means a less diluted flavor, putting these noodles on par with those made using top-quality flour!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Step on Up and Have a Bite, Folks!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sangoro's ultimate stand-and- eat soba bowls are piping hot and ready to go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: 1.Gulp D.U.:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: One bowl, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: One for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Hey, I was first!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Uh-oh! Big bro, this turned ugly fast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: GRPRRI

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I gotta say, if my opponent's leaning on ingredient quality only...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: ...then I don't see myself losing.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if they're the kind of scum who cheats their customers too?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I'll make sure they don't ever set foot in a kitchen again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Who is this man?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: He's clearly no average cook!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: WH- WHO ARE YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I-I'll go let the kyoshiro family know, big bro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hah! That's it! Once Kuni, Kaku, and Suke arrive...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...they'll smash his little stall and him along with it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, there we go! I knew you'd do it, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: AGH! You idiot! Don't use that name!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: San... Ji?

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Did you just say "Sanji"?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Oh no...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Oh no!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: About two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I found a scrap of a wanted poster...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Among the wreckage of a pirate ship that washed ashore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With news of the outside world strictly regulated, all I could do was piece together faint rumors, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: ...THIS SANJ! GENTLEMAN WAS AMAZING!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why, he was the head chef of a pirate fleet numbering in the millions!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: (though I couldn't figure out why they used a poorly drawn image on the poster instead of a photo.)

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
